name: @forgeax/engine-debug-draw
description: Immediate-mode debug-draw convenience layer on top of RHI — line / sphere / aabb / frustum shape API with per-frame CPU staging and single-PSO line-list rendering.

fps.reason: library package, no runtime canvas; fps reported by hello-debug-draw app

bench.reason: bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math; debug-draw correctness verified by unit tests

gate.reason: no package-level binary gate; smoke gate covered by hello-debug-draw app

spike-report.reason: not a spike package; spike artefacts archived in feat-20260615-debug-draw M4 baseline PNGs
